title: AMD, Zeta Global, MercadoLibre, Tempus AI And Workday on Investors' Radars Today
raw_text: Five names are catching investor attention this morning: AMD, Zeta Global, MercadoLibre, Tempus AI, and Workday. Each of these stocks has unusual options activity to monitor.
